title: Walking Tour | Venice, Italy
description: On our walking tour, we were able to listen to our guide share the rich history of Venice and her landmark historical sites. On our way to St. Mark's square we stopped at Chiesa di San Giovanni Novo (left) and the Circolo Artistico - Palazzo Delle Prigioni(right) . The San Giovanni Church at the site today was present by the 10th century, but the façade, which remains mostly incomplete, was rebuilt in 1762 using designs by Matteo Lucchesi. venicewiki.org/wiki/Chiesa_di_San_Giovanni_Nuovo Palazzo Delle Prigion was the Palace prison accessed by the Bridge of Sighs, completed by architect Antonio da Ponte in 1589 www.circoloartisticodivenezia.it/it/il-palazzo-delle-prig...
